seed_problem: Select a maximum-weight set of mutually non-conflicting research sites on a general conflict graph; checker validates independence and scores weight/baseline.
mutation: input: generalize the conflict graph from an easy (bipartite / clique-partition) structure to a general graph built from zone cliques plus random cross-zone conflicts among high-profit routes, so maximum-weight independent set is NP-hard and profit-greedy vs. weight/degree local search diverge; scored as achieved profit over the best-single-route baseline.
title: Recycling Depot Routes: Non-Conflicting Collection Plan
strategies: trivial baseline: run only the single most-profitable collection route
profit-descending greedy: take routes from most to least profitable, skipping any that conflict with a chosen route
weight/degree (GWMIN) greedy: repeatedly take the alive route maximizing profit/(remaining-conflict-degree+1)
randomized multi-restart local search: perturb the greedy order, then improve with free-add passes and (1 -> many) swap moves, keeping the best independent selection
